4109 if (FalseBOSI->getCondition() == CondVal) {
4110 replaceOperand(*FalseBO, 1, FalseBOSI->getFalseValue());
4111 Worklist.push(FalseBO);
4112 return &SI;
4113 }
4114 }
4115 }
4116
4117 Value *NotCond;
4118 if (match(CondVal, m_Not(m_Value(NotCond))) &&
4119 !InstCombiner::shouldAvoidAbsorbingNotIntoSelect(SI)) {
4120 replaceOperand(SI, 0, NotCond);
4121 SI.swapValues();
4122 SI.swapProfMetadata();
4123 return &SI;
4124 }
4125
4126 if (Instruction *I = foldVectorSelect(SI))
4127 return I;
4128
4129 // If we can compute the condition, there's no need for a select.
4130 // Like the above fold, we are attempting to reduce compile-time cost by
4131 // putting this fold here with limitations rather than in InstSimplify.
4132 // The motivation for this call into value tracking is to take advantage of
4133 // the assumption cache, so make sure that is populated.
4134 if (!CondVal->getType()->isVectorTy() && !AC.assumptions().empty()) {
4135 KnownBits Known(1);
4136 computeKnownBits(CondVal, Known, 0, &SI);
4137 if (Known.One.isOne())
4138 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, TrueVal);
4139 if (Known.Zero.isOne())
4140 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, FalseVal);
4141 }
4142
4143 if (Instruction *BitCastSel = foldSelectCmpBitcasts(SI, Builder))
4144 return BitCastSel;
4145
4146 // Simplify selects that test the returned flag of cmpxchg instructions.
4147 if (Value *V = foldSelectCmpXchg(SI))
4148 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, V);
4149
4150 if (Instruction *Select = foldSelectBinOpIdentity(SI, TLI, *this))
4151 return Select;
4152
4153 if (Instruction *Funnel = foldSelectFunnelShift(SI, Builder))
4154 return Funnel;
4155
4156 if (Instruction *Copysign = foldSelectToCopysign(SI, Builder))
4157 return Copysign;
4158
4159 if (Instruction *PN = foldSelectToPhi(SI, DT, Builder))
4160 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, PN);
4161
4162 if (Value *Fr = foldSelectWithFrozenICmp(SI, Builder))
4163 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, Fr);
4164
4165 if (Value *V = foldRoundUpIntegerWithPow2Alignment(SI, Builder))
4166 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, V);
4167
4168 if (Value *V = foldSelectIntoAddConstant(SI, Builder))
4169 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, V);
4170
4171 // select(mask, mload(,,mask,0), 0) -> mload(,,mask,0)
4172 // Load inst is intentionally not checked for hasOneUse()
4173 if (match(FalseVal, m_Zero()) &&
4174 (match(TrueVal, m_MaskedLoad(m_Value(), m_Value(), m_Specific(CondVal),
4175 m_CombineOr(m_Undef(), m_Zero()))) ||
4176 match(TrueVal, m_MaskedGather(m_Value(), m_Value(), m_Specific(CondVal),
4177 m_CombineOr(m_Undef(), m_Zero()))))) {
4178 auto *MaskedInst = cast<IntrinsicInst>(TrueVal);
4179 if (isa<UndefValue>(MaskedInst->getArgOperand(3)))
4180 MaskedInst->setArgOperand(3, FalseVal /* Zero */);
4181 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, MaskedInst);
4182 }
4183
4184 Value *Mask;
4185 if (match(TrueVal, m_Zero()) &&
4186 (match(FalseVal, m_MaskedLoad(m_Value(), m_Value(), m_Value(Mask),
4187 m_CombineOr(m_Undef(), m_Zero()))) ||
4188 match(FalseVal, m_MaskedGather(m_Value(), m_Value(), m_Value(Mask),
4189 m_CombineOr(m_Undef(), m_Zero())))) &&
4190 (CondVal->getType() == Mask->getType())) {
4191 // We can remove the select by ensuring the load zeros all lanes the
4192 // select would have. We determine this by proving there is no overlap
4193 // between the load and select masks.
4194 // (i.e (load_mask & select_mask) == 0 == no overlap)
4195 bool CanMergeSelectIntoLoad = false;
4196 if (Value *V = simplifyAndInst(CondVal, Mask, SQ.getWithInstruction(&SI)))
4197 CanMergeSelectIntoLoad = match(V, m_Zero());
4198
4199 if (CanMergeSelectIntoLoad) {
4200 auto *MaskedInst = cast<IntrinsicInst>(FalseVal);
4201 if (isa<UndefValue>(MaskedInst->getArgOperand(3)))
4202 MaskedInst->setArgOperand(3, TrueVal /* Zero */);
4203 return replaceInstUsesWith(SI, MaskedInst);
4204 }
4205 }
4206
4207 if (Instruction *I = foldSelectOfSymmetricSelect(SI, Builder))
4208 return I;
4209
4210 if (Instruction *I = foldNestedSelects(SI, Builder))
4211 return I;
4212
4213 // Match logical variants of the pattern,
4214 // and transform them iff that gets rid of inversions.
4215 // (~x) | y --> ~(x & (~y))
4216 // (~x) & y --> ~(x | (~y))
4217 if (sinkNotIntoOtherHandOfLogicalOp(SI))
4218 return &SI;
4219
4220 if (Instruction *I = foldBitCeil(SI, Builder, *this))
4221 return I;
4222
4223 if (Instruction *I = foldSelectToCmp(SI))
4224 return I;
4225
4226 if (Instruction *I = foldSelectEqualityTest(SI))
4227 return I;
4228
4229 // Fold:
4230 // (select A && B, T, F) -> (select A, (select B, T, F), F)
4231 // (select A || B, T, F) -> (select A, T, (select B, T, F))
4232 // if (select B, T, F) is foldable.
4233 // TODO: preserve FMF flags
4234 auto FoldSelectWithAndOrCond = [&](bool IsAnd, Value *A,
4235 Value *B) -> Instruction * {
4236 if (Value *V = simplifySelectInst(B, TrueVal, FalseVal,
4237 SQ.getWithInstruction(&SI)))
4238 return SelectInst::Create(A, IsAnd ? V : TrueVal, IsAnd ? FalseVal : V);
4239
4240 // Is (select B, T, F) a SPF?
4241 if (CondVal->hasOneUse() && SelType->isIntOrIntVectorTy()) {
4242 if (ICmpInst *Cmp = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(B))
4243 if (Value *V = canonicalizeSPF(*Cmp, TrueVal, FalseVal, *this))
4244 return SelectInst::Create(A, IsAnd ? V : TrueVal,
4245 IsAnd ? FalseVal : V);
4246 }
4247
4248 return nullptr;
4249 };
4250
4251 Value *LHS, *RHS;
4252 if (match(CondVal, m_And(m_Value(LHS), m_Value(RHS)))) {
4253 if (Instruction *I = FoldSelectWithAndOrCond(/*IsAnd*/ true, LHS, RHS))
4254 return I;
4255 if (Instruction *I = FoldSelectWithAndOrCond(/*IsAnd*/ true, RHS, LHS))
4256 return I;
4257 } else if (match(CondVal, m_Or(m_Value(LHS), m_Value(RHS)))) {
4258 if (Instruction *I = FoldSelectWithAndOrCond(/*IsAnd*/ false, LHS, RHS))
4259 return I;
4260 if (Instruction *I = FoldSelectWithAndOrCond(/*IsAnd*/ false, RHS, LHS))
4261 return I;
4262 } else {
4263 // We cannot swap the operands of logical and/or.
4264 // TODO: Can we swap the operands by inserting a freeze?
4265 if (match(CondVal, m_LogicalAnd(m_Value(LHS), m_Value(RHS)))) {
4266 if (Instruction *I = FoldSelectWithAndOrCond(/*IsAnd*/ true, LHS, RHS))
4267 return I;
4268 } else if (match(CondVal, m_LogicalOr(m_Value(LHS), m_Value(RHS)))) {
4269 if (Instruction *I = FoldSelectWithAndOrCond(/*IsAnd*/ false, LHS, RHS))
4270 return I;
4271 }
4272 }
4273
4274 // select Cond, !X, X -> xor Cond, X
4275 if (CondVal->getType() == SI.getType() && isKnownInversion(FalseVal, TrueVal))
4276 return BinaryOperator::CreateXor(CondVal, FalseVal);
4277
4278 // For vectors, this transform is only safe if the simplification does not
4279 // look through any lane-crossing operations. For now, limit to scalars only.
4280 if (SelType->isIntegerTy() &&
4281 (!isa<Constant>(TrueVal) || !isa<Constant>(FalseVal))) {
4282 // Try to simplify select arms based on KnownBits implied by the condition.
4283 CondContext CC(CondVal);
4284 findValuesAffectedByCondition(CondVal, /*IsAssume=*/false, [&](Value *V) {
4285 CC.AffectedValues.insert(V);
4286 });
4287 SimplifyQuery Q = SQ.getWithInstruction(&SI).getWithCondContext(CC);
4288 if (!CC.AffectedValues.empty()) {
4289 if (!isa<Constant>(TrueVal) &&
4290 hasAffectedValue(TrueVal, CC.AffectedValues, /*Depth=*/0)) {
4291 KnownBits Known = llvm::computeKnownBits(TrueVal, /*Depth=*/0, Q);
4292 if (Known.isConstant())
4293 return replaceOperand(SI, 1,
4294 ConstantInt::get(SelType, Known.getConstant()));
4295 }
4296
4297 CC.Invert = true;
4298 if (!isa<Constant>(FalseVal) &&
4299 hasAffectedValue(FalseVal, CC.AffectedValues, /*Depth=*/0)) {
4300 KnownBits Known = llvm::computeKnownBits(FalseVal, /*Depth=*/0, Q);
4301 if (Known.isConstant())
4302 return replaceOperand(SI, 2,
4303 ConstantInt::get(SelType, Known.getConstant()));
4304 }
4305 }
4306 }
4307
4308 // select (trunc nuw X to i1), X, Y --> select (trunc nuw X to i1), 1, Y
4309 // select (trunc nuw X to i1), Y, X --> select (trunc nuw X to i1), Y, 0
4310 // select (trunc nsw X to i1), X, Y --> select (trunc nsw X to i1), -1, Y
4311 // select (trunc nsw X to i1), Y, X --> select (trunc nsw X to i1), Y, 0
4312 Value *Trunc;
4313 if (match(CondVal, m_NUWTrunc(m_Value(Trunc)))) {
4314 if (TrueVal == Trunc)
4315 return replaceOperand(SI, 1, ConstantInt::get(TrueVal->getType(), 1));
4316 if (FalseVal == Trunc)
4317 return replaceOperand(SI, 2, ConstantInt::get(FalseVal->getType(), 0));
4318 }
4319 if (match(CondVal, m_NSWTrunc(m_Value(Trunc)))) {
4320 if (TrueVal == Trunc)
4321 return replaceOperand(SI, 1,
4322 Constant::getAllOnesValue(TrueVal->getType()));
4323 if (FalseVal == Trunc)
4324 return replaceOperand(SI, 2, ConstantInt::get(FalseVal->getType(), 0));
4325 }
4326
4327 return nullptr;
4328}
